div.div: 2) 通过 softmax 函数获得每个输入标记的 7 维概率行向量。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 288px; height: 1px; padding-top: 148px; margin-left: 315px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Maple Mono NF CN'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.span: 3) 在每个行向量中找到概率值最高的索引位置，这是通过 argmax 函数完成的

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 450px; margin-left: 575px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Maple Mono NF CN'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 4）获取所有预测的标记ID，作为概率最高的索引位置。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 318px; margin-left: 775px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Maple Mono NF CN'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 5) 通过逆词汇表将索引位置映射回文本

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 168px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 646px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

line-height: 200%;
